summary: 8 visitor-path issues recorded with fresh evidence. Root causes span brand metaphor drift (SoulLink vs FableMap), discovery overload, copy leaks, workbench exposure, NPC non-response truthfulness, memory overclaim, and hydration errors.

reason: Product identity: FableMap is 'map-anchored space UGC platform', not SoulLink/signal-network
Core user flow: explorer finds tavern on map → enters → chats with AI NPC → memory writes back → revisit
Real anchor + owner sovereignty + AI NPC conversation + visitor discovery are the four pillars
Frontend must preserve real map/coordinate anchoring and mobile usability
Home page renders SoulLinkHomeReference component — primary brand drift surface
Discovery page decision overload — filters, world stats, online entities compete before visitor understands value
Tavern page exposes workbench controls before immersion; coordinates visible but no map surface
whyHere text reads like internal PRD guidance, not visitor-facing invitation copy
Entire UI shell uses SoulLink/node-network metaphors; brand vs product mismatch
NPC fallback sends generic non-answer; memory/progress badges still shown after non-answer

evidence: Browser DOM shows SoulLink, ONLINE COORDINATE NETWORK, ONLINE ENTITIES, 信号活动, 数字坐标网络. Product contract is FableMap / real-map anchored tavern spaces.
fix_direction: Rename SoulLink shell → FableMap. Replace node/network/signal metaphors → map/tavern/space metaphors. Rename components and copy. Do NOT treat as full rebrand; treat as naming alignment.

evidence: Tavern page shows coordinates (35.65810, 139.70160) but no map surface in tested visitor path.
fix_direction: Add visible map element or mini-map in tavern entry card / tavern first screen. Show distance from user location. Make spatial exploration feel real.

evidence: Filters, emotional tags, signal state, timeline, feed, online entities, echoes, footprint, world stats compete before visitor understands why to enter.
fix_direction: Reduce to map + top 3 taverns + one clear CTA per tavern. Remove world stats, online entities, echoes, footprints from visitor view. Keep only filters that help pick ONE tavern in <10s.

evidence: whyHere text contains: '这里的第一分钟要从……开始，而不是泛泛开聊' — reads like implementation/spec guidance.
fix_direction: Rewrite whyHere in tavern-first-minute.ts to visitor-facing invitation. No internal acceptance language. Test with first-time visitor mental model.

evidence: 公共频道, Channels, Shift+Enter, intent chips, identity selector, NPC target chips, helper accordions visible before space delivers roleplay hook.
fix_direction: Audit tavern.tsx first load. Show space hook + NPC greeting + one clear action first. Hide workbench controls until after first immersion beat.

evidence: Visitor: '我第一次来，这里有什么值得我留下？' NPC: '小舟点了点头，似乎在听你说话，但暂时没有更多回复。' Core promise collapses.
fix_direction: Detect non-answer fallback in backend runtime. If fallback fires, do NOT show progress/memory/relationship badges. Show explicit loading/retry state instead.

evidence: After fallback non-answer: UI shows '本轮有推进', '记住了 1 件事', '关系进入陌生人' — fake progress after non-answer.
fix_direction: Gate progress/memory/relationship badges behind successful chat response. Only show badges when NPC gave a real, non-fallback response.

evidence: Build passes, but browser console reports React minified errors #418 and #423 repeatedly after reload on /, /discover, /tavern routes.
fix_direction: Reproduce #418/#423 in focused browser/runtime check. Find root cause (likely SSR/data mismatch in dynamic content). Fix or record root-cause blocker.
